issues.description: Action type 'PowerBoost' is incorrect. The effect does not boost power; it prevents opponent's Blocker activation. Should use a custom keyword action or represent as a conditional restriction.
Condition 'maxPower:6000' is backwards. Effect selects Characters with 6000 power or MORE (≥6000), not maximum 6000. Should be 'minPower:6000'.
Target scope missing type filter. Must select only {Straw Hat Crew} type Characters. Should include 'characterType:"Straw Hat Crew"' in target.
Duration 'EndOfTurn' is incorrect. Effect applies '[Your Turn]' (only during your turn, while selected Character is attacking). Should be 'DuringYourTurn'.

Missing conditional trigger: effect only applies 'If the selected Character attacks during this turn'. Current DSL unconditionally applies effect on play. Needs sub-trigger OnAttack with target condition matching selected Character.
